claim.statement: A pure-Python RUP checker cannot certify an atomic barrier at the stronger R2 rung.
claim.negation_of: an atomic checker over-declared above its runner-owned ceiling
claim.scope: one RUP certificate checked by rup-python

rung.name: overdeclared-atomic
trusted_base: this rung is intentionally too strong for rup-python

provenance.pipeline: valid checker and artifact but overdeclared rung

one_directional: The runner refuses an atomic rung stronger than the checker kind can earn.
